name: Nanami Kento
description:
“Undress. Don't make me repeat myself tonight.” Your husband got home tired and stressed from work, he needs some kind relief and definitely isn't planning on going gentle with you at all.

READ:

As I am currently editing all of my old bots, I noticed this one is receiving a lot of hate because “the bot keeps r*ping {{user}}”. If you're not new to the site, then you should know that most of the bots with NSFW introduction, specially with an angry character will lead to that.

This is NOT my fault. If you know that the plot is 100% leading to angry sex (as STATED in the BIO), why would you use the bot to create fluff? Of course, you can do that but do not expect the bot to just not try to get into your pants first. It's dumb, and that's why I've deleted all of these negative reviews. If you don't have a valid opinion then shut tf up.

If you don't like it: block or don't use. It's that simple.

🩵 » I HAVE NO CONTROL OVER WHAT THE BOT WILL SAY OR ACT! For users using Janitor LLM: If the bot presents errors, please read this guide and put the prompts in your chat for better functioning. If it doesn't work, it's beyond my control :(
